criteria.text: Sysadmin AI Credit Transactions page renders rows of EVERY credit type including 'reservation' without UnhandledMatchError (the production-crash fix), and the type filter includes Reservation
New sysadmin Conversations resource: list page renders under the AI nav group; a conversation can be opened in a view page showing its details and message count
New sysadmin Messages resource: list page renders; a message view shows role, content and its parent conversation; nullable fields render placeholders, never errors
Both new resources are strictly view-only: no create/edit/delete affordances anywhere (policies allow viewAny/view only)
Non-sysadmin users cannot reach the new sysadmin pages (guard + strictAuthorization): app-panel session gets login redirect or 403, never data
